author: lOrm
content: Delivered: Replaced all three Command::new('kill') PATH-lookups with direct libc::kill() syscalls. Uses pid.cast_signed() (clippy pedantic preferred form), process_group_id variable name (avoids similar_names lint). SIGTERM/SIGKILL errors are now logged via tracing::debug instead of let _-discarded. Windows path unchanged (uses taskkill, no PATH issue there). 1135 tests pass, clippy clean, rustfmt exit 0.
